title: This company killed open source
summary: Alberta Tech video argues that Malus, a company or tool, is harming or "killing" open source. The video covers what open source is, discusses an AI agent conflict, examines Malus's operations, and debates whether the company is detrimental to open source maintainers and the ecosystem.
